name: BTF200Z Fresnel Zoom 200W LED Wit
comment:
BTF200Z Fresnel Zoom 200W LED Wit 3200K: BTF200Z Fresnel Zoom 200W LED White 3200K
The BeamZ BTF200Z Fresnel Zoom uses a high power single source LED engine to provide a smooth and even field of warm white light, providing a modern replacement for traditional fresnels. The BTF200Z is equipped with high-quality optics, a motorized 15-60 degree zoom function and is both dimmable and able to be operated as a strobe up to 19 flashes per second. Ideal for use in theatres, studios, museums, exhibitions or any stage setting that requires smooth warm white output from an energy saving fixture with exceptionally long life. Features Powerconnector in&out and DMX controllability. Supplied with barndoors for beam shaping and glare reduction, safety cord and colour frame.
